sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO cart (member_id, status, reg_date) VALUES (#memberId#, 'OPEN', #regDate#) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.select: SELECT cart_id, member_id, status, reg_date FROM cart WHERE member_id = #memberId# AND status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY cart_id DESC LIMIT 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item (cart_id, option_id, qty) VALUES (#cartId#, #optionId#, #qty#) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.update: UPDATE cart_item SET qty = #qty# WHERE cart_item_id = #cartItemId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ci.cart_item_id, ci.cart_id, ci.option_id, ci.qty, po.option_name, (p.price + po.extra_price) AS unit_price, (p.price + po.extra_price) * ci.qty AS line_total, p.name AS product_name FROM cart_item ci JOIN product_option po ON ci.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE ci.cart_id = #cartId# ORDER BY ci.cart_item_id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE cart SET status = 'ORDERED' WHERE cart_id = #cartId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart WHERE status = 'OPEN'

SELECT ci.cart_item_id, ci.cart_id, ci.option_id, ci.qty, po.option_name, (p.price + po.extra_price) AS UNIT_PRICE, (p.price + po.extra_price) * ci.qty AS LINE_TOTAL, p.name AS PRODUCT_NAME, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CASE pr.discount_type WHEN 'F' THEN pr.discount_val WHEN 'R' THEN (p.price * pr.discount_val / 100) ELSE 0 END) FROM campaign_product cp JOIN promotion pr ON cp.promotion_id = pr.promotion_id WHERE cp.product_id = p.product_id AND pr.status='ACTIVE' AND #today# BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date),0) AS PROMO_DISCOUNT FROM cart_item ci JOIN product_option po ON ci.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE ci.cart_id = #cartId# ORDER BY ci.cart_item_id

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.line_total - t.promo * t.qty),0) FROM ( SELECT (p.price + po.extra_price) * ci.qty AS line_total, ci.qty AS qty, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CASE pr.discount_type WHEN 'F' THEN pr.discount_val WHEN 'R' THEN (p.price * pr.discount_val / 100) ELSE 0 END) FROM campaign_product cp JOIN promotion pr ON cp.promotion_id = pr.promotion_id WHERE cp.product_id = p.product_id AND pr.status='ACTIVE' AND #today# BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date),0) AS promo FROM cart_item ci JOIN product_option po ON ci.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE ci.cart_id = #cartId#) t

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ci.cart_item_id) FROM cart_item ci JOIN product_option po ON ci.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE ci.cart_id = #cartId# AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM campaign_product cp JOIN promotion pr ON cp.promotion_id = pr.promotion_id WHERE cp.product_id = p.product_id AND pr.status='ACTIVE' AND #today# BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date)
